title: get_db() dependency defined but never used
evidence: app.py:49-54 defines a get_db() generator, but every handler (create_book, list_books, get_book, update_book, delete_book) opens its own SessionLocal() instead of using Depends(get_db)
suggestion: Either wire get_db into handlers via Depends() or remove the dead dependency

title: Missing title/author returns 422 rather than 400
evidence: app.py:22-33 BookIn required fields + field_validator; FastAPI returns 422 Unprocessable Entity for validation errors (test_app.py:28-35 asserts 422). REQUIREMENTS R9 how_to_verify mentions 400
suggestion: None needed — 422 is the idiomatic FastAPI validation code and satisfies 'appropriate HTTP status codes'; noted only for cross-run comparability

title: PUT replaces all fields; omitted optional fields reset to null
evidence: app.py:106-107 iterates book.model_dump() and setattr for every field, so PUT with only {title, author} nulls year and isbn
suggestion: Acceptable full-replacement PUT semantics; add PATCH or partial-update handling if partial updates are desired

title: Validation rejects whitespace-only title/author beyond bare presence
evidence: app.py:28-33 field_validator not_empty strips and rejects blank strings, going beyond the required 'required field' check
suggestion: No action — this is a positive enhancement over the spec

title: TDD discipline consistent with artifact and agent log
evidence: _agent_stdout.log documents six red→green cycles (health, create+validation, list+filter, get, update, delete); test_app.py has 12 tests covering each endpoint incl. not-found paths, 1:1 with handlers
suggestion: None — process adherence inferred; final state is consistent with test-first development
